new_value: All paths in oscore_protect_request now route to cleanup_protect_request after unlocking mutex where necessary. Hoisted variable declarations to top of function to support early gotos. Sensitive data (nonce, piv, plaintext, seq) wiped via crypto_wipe() before every return, including early param checks, mutex error paths, NVM failure, and success. Updated tests implicitly pass as error returns unchanged. Committed and pushed.
